element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic melee and ranged combat fundamentals
Core fighting mechanic across all levels
Character-specific projectile or energy beam attacks
Living Laser, Whirlwind, Sentinel, Wizard, Grim Reaper, Mandarin, Juggernaut, Ultron, Controller, Crossbones
Ultimate encounter requiring mastery of all mechanics
Wasp, Quicksilver, Wonder Man, Namor appearance assists

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based combat with escalating supervillain difficulty; alternates between side-scrolling brawling sections and flight sequences

difficulty_curve.early_game: Generic henchmen introduction; single character mechanics tutorial
difficulty_curve.mid_game: First supervillains (Klaw, Living Laser, Whirlwind); introduction of flight sequences; increased enemy density
difficulty_curve.late_game: Powerful supervillains (Mandarin, Juggernaut, Ultron, Controller, Crossbones); sustained combat intensity

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard side-scrolling brawler sections with generic enemy encounters, allowing practice of melee, throws, and special attacks
Named Marvel antagonists (Klaw, Living Laser, Whirlwind, etc.) as individual level climaxes requiring pattern recognition and mastery of character abilities
Side-scrolling flying and shooting sections where Iron Man and Vision fly independently, while Captain America and Hawkeye use flying machines
Red Skull final boss encounter requiring synthesis of all learned mechanics and combat patterns

sources_used: wikipedia: Captain America and The Avengers gameplay section
